task_language: put both the cream cheese and the tomato sauce in the basket
strategy_notes: WINNING RECIPE (attempt 8) — followed attempt 7's lesson: AVOID pi0_doubled (causes orientation drift), use pi0_pick from clean home for BOTH items.

Localization (SAM3 segment from initial agentview): tomato_sauce (-0.079, 0.038, 0.495), basket interior (0.071, 0.227, 0.527), cream_cheese (0.110, -0.189, 0.456). Matches attempt 5's coords exactly.

Step 1 — tomato_sauce: pi0_pick('pick up the tomato sauce', max_chunks=25, lift_thresh=0.05, gripper_closed_thresh=0.06) from clean home. Succeeded in 5 chunks: peak_lift=0.069, gripper_opening=0.050 (held). Wrist confirmed can in grip.
Step 2 — carry tomato: single move_to([0.07,0.23,0.62], gripper=1, step_clip=0.015) directly to over basket (dy=0.18, within 0.30 limit). final_dist=0.011.
Step 3 — release tomato: gripper opened to 0.078; tomato dropped into basket from z=0.62.
Step 4 — re-home with gripper=-1 to clean orientation for next pick.

Step 5 — cream_cheese: pi0_pick('pick up the cream cheese', max_chunks=20, lift_thresh=0.05) from clean home. Succeeded in 8 chunks: peak_lift=0.143, gripper_opening=0.043 (thin box held — qpos closed from 0.040 to 0.021). Wrist confirmed: silver/blue 'Cream' box clearly visible in gripper.

Step 6 — carry cream_cheese: split because dy=0.407 > 0.30. First move_to([0.10,0.02,0.62], gripper=1, step_clip=0.012) — gripper still 0.021 (held). Second move_to([0.07,0.23,0.62], gripper=1, step_clip=0.012) — gripper still 0.021. Carry LOW at z=0.62 (not z=0.70 like attempt 2's drop point).
Step 7 — release cream_cheese over basket interior: gripper opened to 0.078. libero_terminated=TRUE on release.

Key levers vs the 7 prior failures: (a) NO pi0_doubled — avoids orientation drift that broke attempts 3, 6, 7; (b) clean home before each pi0_pick — pi0 has its own approach trajectory and works well on small thin box from home; (c) carry at z=0.62 (not 0.70) so any slip lands closer to basket; (d) step_clip 0.012 on cream_cheese carry — gentle motion keeps box from squeezing out laterally; (e) NEVER did set_gripper +1 firming after pi0_pick (attempt 5 root cause: set_gripper+1 over-tightens and squeezes the thin box out — let pi0's own grip suffice with gripper=1 in move_to).
